content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules hourly repeating push notifications (NotificationScheduler.swift: `scheduleHourlyDeals`, `repeats: true`, 3600s interval) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications, all day long", matching Apple's spam-push pattern.
Pierre: Apple explicitly rejects apps that use push notifications for promotional spam or that promise unlimited/frequent unsolicited alerts, since this isn't user-initiated content but a marketing blast disguised as a notification. Here both the code and the App Store description confirm an automatic hourly repeating push with no user configuration of frequency. Fix by making notification frequency user-controlled (opt-in cadence, not forced hourly) and rewrite the description to avoid "unlimited"/"every hour" spam framing.
